prestazioni: VQ35DE (NEO) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE 9.0:1 compression pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by HKS Hi-Power with 200-cell catalytic converters for minimal backpressure

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with custom fuel and ignition maps, integrated with a Haltech CAN-based PDM15 power distribution module and dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps feeding ID1000x injectors, while utilizing a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise turbo spool control

Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the V35’s multilink suspension, paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115) for subframe reinforcement, complemented by Endless 6-pot front and 4-pot rear brake calipers with 356mm two-piece rotors
estetica: Rocket Bunny V35 widebody kit (Pandem Version 2) with carbon fiber front fenders, extended rear quarter panels, and a custom 3D-printed ABS diffuser, all finished in Nissan ‘Midnight Purple III’ (code: M70) with a matte clear coat by PPG

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,800mm width) with adjustable carbon fiber side plates and a custom aluminum gurney flap, mounted on a custom aluminum substructure reinforced with Cusco strut tower bars (front and rear) for chassis rigidity

Custom interior overhaul featuring a full Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seat setup with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay by Auto Meter with a 260mm tachometer (0-10,000 RPM), boost gauge (0-30 PSI), and oil pressure gauge (0-100 PSI)
